name: METs Calculator
description: Calculate calories burned by MET value.
seo_description: Use our free mets calculator to quickly estimate calories based on weight, mets, minutes. Not registration needed.
result_context: 1 MET = reposo; activities moderadas are 3-6 METs, vigorosas >6 METs according to intensity.
steps: Select METs of the actividad (1=reposo, 5=caminar fast)
mistakes: Use METs of actividad incorrecta (consultar compendio Ainsworth)
Not considering that METs varies per intensity (caminar ≠ correr)
Add calories of ejercicio without count línea base (already incluidas in TDEE)
desc: Free online mets calculator. Enter weight and mets to get instant results.
